passiveAbilities.name: Link to the Past
passiveAbilities.description: If a friendly Danica, Dusk Witch was taken in this troupe at the start of the game then this character gains +1 Arcane Stat and reduces the energy cost of the first Arcane Ability targeting a friendly Witch in a turn by -1.

arcaneAbilities.name: Candy Apples
arcaneAbilities.description:
Move target 2X" directly towards this character. Then, if the target is within 2" of this character they suffer 4 Wds.
Catastrophe: All models within 4" suffer 2 Magical Dmg.

arcaneAbilities.name: Healing
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target restores X+1 Wds.
Catastrophe: This model suffers 2 Wds.

arcaneAbilities.name: Visions of the Present
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers an amount of Wds equal to the number of Wds they have currently suffered.
Catastrophe: This character suffers an amount of Wds equal to the number of Wd's they have currently suffered
